message:
fix(repair): harden RefreshLossModel edge cases for zero blocks, zero writes, and degenerate thresholds

Fix expected_loss_age_only, expected_loss_block_count, and
expected_loss_hybrid to handle edge cases correctly:
- source_block_count==0 returns 0.0 (no blocks, no loss) instead of
  refresh_io_cost
- max_staleness_secs<=0 returns f64::MAX (degenerate infinite refresh)
  instead of a finite cost
- write_rate<=0 returns 0.0 (no writes, no refreshes needed) instead
  of a fabricated cost
- Clamp negative write rates to 0.0 throughout
- Hybrid with both triggers disabled returns 0.0 instead of
  refresh_io_cost

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
